meaning: adj.(=hypochondriac)忧郁症的,过分担心自己健康的
examples: The effect of clozapine and a antidepressant in the treatment of hypochondriacal neurosis.
Objective To evaluate the effect of clozapine and a antidepressant in the treatment of hypochondriacal neurosis.
Objective To study effect of psychotherapy of hypochondriacal neurosis on psychology and physical rehabilitation.
Every last crooked rock of the place had at some point seated the bony arse of some hypochondriacal epiphany-seeker.
